title: euphrasia officinalis subvar. stricta
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subvar. stricta, also known as Eyebright, is a herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eyebright include its ability to reduce eye inflammation, alleviate sinus congestion, and soothe sore throats. Eyebright can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also available in capsule or tablet form for easy consumption.
